title: NotificationCampaign
description: Neynar Farcaster API schema for NotificationCampaign

body.description: The body text of the notification.

completed_at.description: When the campaign reached a terminal state (completed/failed/canceled). Null while still queued or running.

id.description: The unique identifier for the notification campaign.

queued_at.description: When the campaign was enqueued for async delivery.

status.description: Lifecycle status of the campaign. Absent on campaigns created before async delivery was introduced.

title.description: The title of the notification campaign.
